title: Speedboat Hire in Estepona Port: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
Estepona Port on the Costa del Sol offers direct access to the Mediterranean, with speedboat hire starting from around 350 EUR for a half-day trip. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Estepona Port or list your own.

How much does it cost to rent a speedboat in Estepona Port?

Prices for speedboat hire in Estepona Port typically range from 350 to 800 EUR for a half-day, depending on the boat size and season. Shared tours start at 90 EUR per person for a two-hour coastal cruise. Private charters with a skipper often include fuel and insurance, with costs rising in July and August. For exact current rates, it is wise to compare verified boat listings on platforms like BoatHire24. You can compare verified boat listings in a few minutes.

A half-day hire of a 22-foot motorboat might cost 400 EUR, while a 28-foot Axopar like the Limpopo can be 600 EUR. Full-day rates for a 35-foot boat may reach 1,200 EUR. Always check what is included: fuel, VAT, and any additional charges for extended cruising.

Where to set off in Estepona Port

Most speedboat hire departs from Puerto Deportivo de Estepona, the main marina with fuel dock and parking. Nearby options include the Cabopino Marina eastwards, while Gibraltar to the south offers sheltered waters. The Bay of Algeciras provides a longer cruising ground, and Marbella's Puerto Banús is a 20-minute run north. For island exploration, reach the Cabo de Gata reserve, though it is a full-day trip from Estepona.

Which boat to rent for speedboating in Estepona

  1. Rib tender, ideal for quick coastal hops up to 6 guests, from 350 EUR half-day
  2. Bowrider, best for family swimming trips, max 8 guests, from 450 EUR half-day
  3. Axopar 28, a versatile sports cruiser for 10 guests, from 600 EUR half-day; see this speedboat for details
  4. Open sportsboat, perfect for thrill-seekers, up to 6 guests, from 550 EUR half-day
  5. Cabin cruiser, offers shaded comfort for 8 guests, from 700 EUR half-day

Do you need a licence to rent a speedboat in Estepona Port?

Spanish regulations require a boating licence for most motor vessels over 15 HP, but many hire operators include a skipper for unlicenced renters. Typically, you must be at least 18 and present a valid ID. If you hold an ICC or equivalent, you may drive without a skipper. Always confirm exact requirements with the operator, as rules vary by boat size and engine power.

A local tip: book a morning departure in summer to avoid the afternoon Levante winds, which can make the sea choppy off Estepona from midday.

When is the best season for speedboat hire in Estepona Port

The high season runs from June to September, with July and August the busiest and most expensive months. Spring and autumn offer milder weather and lower prices, often with calm seas. The local Levante wind can pick up in the afternoons, especially from May to October. In 2026, early June or late September provide a balance of warmth and value.

Cost breakdown for boat rental in Estepona

  • Shared speedboat tour: 90, 150 EUR per person for 2 hours
  • Small motorboat (5m) half-day: 350, 500 EUR without skipper
  • Catamaran (12m) full-day: 1,200, 1,800 EUR for up to 12 guests
  • Luxury yacht with crew (15m): from 2,500 EUR per day for 10 guests

At a glance

  • Price band: 90, 2,500 EUR
  • Peak months: June, September
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Capacity: 6, 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Estepona Port

Can I stop for a swim on a speedboat hire?

Most operators allow swimming stops in designated coves, but check permission for specific spots like the protected Cabo de Gata reserve.

What is the distance from Estepona Port to Gibraltar?

The distance is approximately 30 nautical miles, making it a one-hour trip at cruising speed, ideal for a day excursion.

Is fuel included in the hire price?

Many charters include fuel for a standard route, but confirm before booking as some charge fuel as a supplement.

Can I rent a speedboat without a deposit?

A security deposit is standard, often refundable, and can be paid by credit card or cash; amounts vary by boat value.

Whether you plan a fast coastal run or a leisurely island tour, speedboat hire in Estepona Port offers flexibility and fun. If you own a boat in the region, you can list a boat for free on BoatHire24 and reach thousands of potential renters worldwide.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Estepona Port and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
